baseline.name: Baseline (Clarified Labels)

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp1_simplified_nodule.name: Exp 1: Simplified Nodule Label
exp1_simplified_nodule.description: Hypothesis: 'ignore nodes' instruction confuses model, hurts recall

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)

exp2_few_shot.name: Exp 2: Few-Shot Examples
exp2_few_shot.description: Hypothesis: Examples help model understand task format
exp2_few_shot.template:
Classify whether this radiology report indicates {label}.

EXAMPLES:

Report: "PET FDG Whole Body. Findings: Increased FDG uptake in the known primary lung mass, now measuring 4.2cm (previously 3.1cm). New FDG-avid mediastinal lymph nodes."
Answer: yes

Report: "PET FDG Whole Body. Findings: No significant FDG uptake. The previously noted lung nodule shows no metabolic activity. Stable appearance."
Answer: no

NOW CLASSIFY:

Report:
{report_text}

Answer (yes or no):

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp3_evidence_first.name: Exp 3: Evidence-First (Mild CoT)
exp3_evidence_first.description: Hypothesis: Listing evidence before deciding may improve accuracy
exp3_evidence_first.template:
Task: Determine if this report shows {label}.

Report:
{report_text}

First, list relevant findings (one per line, or "None").
Then write: ANSWER: yes or ANSWER: no

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp4_json_confidence.name: Exp 4: JSON with Confidence
exp4_json_confidence.description: Hypothesis: Structured output with confidence may improve calibration

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp5_negative_prompting.name: Exp 5: Negative Prompting
exp5_negative_prompting.description: Hypothesis: Explicit 'do NOT' instructions reduce false positives
exp5_negative_prompting.template:
Determine if this report mentions {label}.

IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT assume information not explicitly stated
- Do NOT confuse similar terms (nodule vs node, mass vs lesion)
- Do NOT answer "yes" unless there is clear evidence

Report:
{report_text}

Answer (yes/no):

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp6_strict_criteria.name: Exp 6: Strict Criteria
exp6_strict_criteria.description: Hypothesis: Clear rules for edge cases improve consistency
exp6_strict_criteria.template:
Does this report contain {label}?

CRITERIA:
- The finding must be explicitly stated, not implied
- Negated findings (e.g., "no tumour") count as "no"
- Uncertain findings (e.g., "possible nodule") count as "yes"

Report:
{report_text}

Answer (yes/no):

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)
